title: Pubertal development and hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis are altered in male mice lacking Mecp2
abstract: MECP2 null male mice show altered pubertal development and hypothalamic-pituitary-gonadal axis dysfunction. Extends MECP2 phenotype beyond classical Rett syndrome CNS features to neuroendocrine axis.
methods: Mecp2 null mouse model, endocrine and developmental assays
summary: Mecp2-null male mice show disrupted puberty and HPG axis. MECP2 is in our 49-gene set (Rett). Relevance is marginal for regulatory variants but notable for MECP2 phenotype breadth.
